nodes.title: villain
nodes.body: Villain is loose-passive (VPIP 63%, PFR 14%) and folds to hero flop c-bets 13/29 times (45%). River aggression shows up in 2/200 hands (1%). Villain has won 81 of 92 showdowns.

nodes.title: Frequent preflop 3-bettor
nodes.body: Villain has 3-bet preflop in 4 completed hands.

nodes.title: Folds to flop c-bets
nodes.body: Villain has folded to hero flop c-bet 13 times across 29 c-bet opportunities.

nodes.title: Folds to river bets
nodes.body: Villain has folded to hero river bets 21 times across 24 river bet opportunities.

nodes.title: Strong showdown caller
nodes.body: Villain has won 81 of 92 showdowns (88%). When villain calls to showdown their range is strong — bluffing at showdown is likely -EV.
